'''Pneumonia''' was a [[Death/Legends|deadly]] disease that, as of [[22 BBY/Legends|21.5 BBY]], was unknown to [[Galactic community|galactic society]] but had ravaged less civilized populations, such as the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" /> It attacked and congested the [[Lung/Legends|lungs]], which would cause labored respiration and wheezing. Antibiotics were used to treat this condition,<ref name="Shatterpoint" /> as well as [[plethyl nitrate]] in some [[Species/Legends|species]], such as [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronians]].<ref name="Medstar 2" />
